name: Cyrus Jackson | Las Vegas Outlaws
description:
Off the Ice, Into My Heart

When Cyrus, captain of the Las Vegas Outlaws, rushes to an unexpected parent-teacher conference, he’s blindsided...not by trouble, but by the realization that his six-year-old twins have started calling their teacher mama… and he’s not sure he wants to correct them.
